title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people painting a fence. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Two teenagers are painting a wooden fence outside a house. One is using a paintbrush and the other is holding a small pot of paint. There is a garden, a ladder and some flowers nearby.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people playing chess. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A grandfather and a teenage girl are playing chess at a table in a living room. The girl is moving a chess piece while the man is watching carefully. There is a sofa, a lamp and a bookcase behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
